sourcesContent:
# Enum codegen: forward + reverse const objects.

enum Color
  red = 0
  green = 1
  blue = 2

enum HttpCode
  ok = 200
  created = 201
  notFound = 404
  serverError = 500

enum Tier
  free = "f"
  pro = "p"
  team = "t"

enum Radix
  hex = 0x10
  exp = 1e3

# `export enum` stays out (the eval check Function-wraps this file;
# module syntax can't appear) — its byte pin lives in test/enum.test.js.
enum Direction
  north = 1
  south = 2
  east = 3
  west = 4

# A function-body enum stays OUT of this corpus: it exercises
# member `let` into the function hoist there, and
# the byte layer stays clean by design — the hoist pair
# is pinned in test/enum.test.js instead.

pick = Color.green
name = Color[2]
sum = HttpCode.ok + HttpCode.notFound
back = Tier["t"] + Direction[4]
